title: Union High girls hockey team triumphs in Makhanda
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The girls first hockey...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The girls first hockey team of Union High School delivered a strong performance at their weekend fixtures in Makhanda.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The girls first hockey team of Union High School delivered a strong performance at their weekend fixtures in Makhanda."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On Friday, the team faced Victorian Girls High School and Union’s girls put in a dominant performance from start to finish."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Controlling possession and setting the pace, the girls created numerous scoring chances and secured a convincing 3-0 win.","html":"Controlling possession and setting the pace, the girls created numerous scoring chances and secured a convincing 3-0 win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The player of the match award went to Aaminah Steele for her energy and control in the final third.","html":"The player of the match award went to Aaminah Steele for her energy and control in the final third."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday’s encounter with Kingswood was more tightly contested, but Union’s tactical discipline and intensity once again shone through.","html":"Saturday’s encounter with Kingswood was more tightly contested, but Union’s tactical discipline and intensity once again shone through."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A brilliant midfield turnover led to a short corner, confidently converted by Tara Ferreira with a stunning drag flick.","html":"A brilliant midfield turnover led to a short corner, confidently converted by Tara Ferreira with a stunning drag flick."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The girls held firm for a well-earned 1-0 victory.","html":"The girls held firm for a well-earned 1-0 victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nadine Murray was awarded player of the match for her work rate, intelligent positioning and ability to turn opposition over.","html":"Nadine Murray was awarded player of the match for her work rate, intelligent positioning and ability to turn opposition over."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Abonani Matushe, who kept two clean sheets and was rock-solid in goal, was player of the weekend.","html":"Abonani Matushe, who kept two clean sheets and was rock-solid in goal, was player of the weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Captain Kenza Neill was congratulated for leading the first team on a successful weekend of hockey.","html":"Captain Kenza Neill was congratulated for leading the first team on a successful weekend of hockey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Kingswood fixture proved a more challenging outing for Union’s other teams.","html":"The Kingswood fixture proved a more challenging outing for Union’s other teams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The U14A and U16A sides both fought hard, but ultimately went down 0-3, while the second team faced a strong opponent and lost 0-4.","html":"The U14A and U16A sides both fought hard, but ultimately went down 0-3, while the second team faced a strong opponent and lost 0-4."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
